name: Verify that a user can create a document with enable otp true and send it for a signature request, and signer can sign the document.
fullName: MainAppPages/Request_Signature.spec.js#Request signature Verify that a user can create a document with enable otp true and send it for a signature request, and signer can sign the document.

steps.name: Wait for selector getByRole('option', { name: 'kelvin Johnson req1<kelvinsjohnson24+req1@gmail.' })
Fill "6909" locator('//input[@placeholder="Enter verification code received over email"]')
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'I confirm & agree to continue' })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'I confirm & agree to continue' })
Wait for selector locator('//div[@class="flex justify-center"]//span[ text()="Draw"]')
Click locator('//div[@class="flex justify-center"]//i[@class="fa-light fa-cloud-upload-alt uploadImgLogo text-base-content"]')
Wait for selector locator('//div[@class="flex justify-center"]//span[ text()="Draw"]')
click on the date field on the signer pad
Select date from calendar by aria-label 'Choose Friday, July 24th, 2026'
Click locator('//div[@class="flex justify-center"]//i[@class="fa-light fa-cloud-upload-alt uploadImgLogo text-base-content"]')
Expect "toContainText" locator('//h1[text()="The document has been signed successfully!"]')
